options.B: Certify the country where goods were produced

Commerce.question: Cash and carry wholesalers differ from other wholesalers because they:

options.B: Do not offer credit or delivery; buyers pay and carry goods

options.A: Govern internal affairs of a company
options.B: Define the company's relationship with the outside world

options.B: Buying in a cheap market and selling in a more expensive one
